name: Article Extractor
description: Extracts clean, readable content from web articles and blog posts, removing ads, navigation, and clutter. Uses Mozilla Readability or trafilatura with automatic fallback.

findings_summary.notes: Subdirectory article-extractor/ confirmed to exist in michalparkola/tapestry-skills-for-claude-code (253 stars, MIT). SKILL.md present. Depends on Mozilla Readability or trafilatura Python library for content extraction. Makes network requests to fetch web pages. No credential exposure risk - fetches public URLs only. Suitable for public article extraction workflows.
